review_text: App crashes every time I try to open the settings page. Started happening after the latest update. Using Pixel 7 on Android 14.
Absolutely love this app! The new task management feature is a game changer. Been using it daily for 3 months now.
Can't login since the update to version 3.2.1. I've tried resetting my password three times but it just shows a spinning loader forever.
Great app overall but would really love to see a dark mode option. My eyes hurt using it at night.
Data sync is completely broken. My tasks from the web version are not showing up on mobile. Lost 2 hours of work.
Best productivity app on the market! Clean interface and very intuitive. Worth every penny of the subscription.
Please add the ability to export tasks as PDF. I need this for my weekly reports to management.
The app is so slow since the last update. Takes 10+ seconds to load the dashboard. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.3.
Would love to see calendar integration with Google Calendar. Currently I have to manually copy my deadlines.
TERRIBLE customer service. I emailed support 3 times about a billing issue and nobody replied. Considering canceling.
The collaboration features are fantastic. My team loves the shared boards. Keep up the great work!
Would be nice to have recurring tasks. I have to recreate the same tasks every Monday which is tedious.
App crashes when I try to attach images to tasks. Samsung Galaxy S23, Android 14. Happens every single time.
Please add Siri shortcuts support so I can add tasks by voice. That would make this app perfect!
Notifications are completely unreliable. I keep missing deadlines because reminders don't fire. Very frustrating.
Just upgraded to premium and it's totally worth it. The analytics dashboard is incredibly useful.

The pricing is too expensive compared to competitors. $9.99/month is steep for a task manager.
Really solid app. Only suggestion: please add widget support for Android home screen.
Lost all my data after the update. Months of project planning gone. This is unacceptable.
Switched from Todoist and never looked back. The subtask feature is so much better here.
Battery drain is terrible. This app uses 30% of my battery daily. Please fix the background processes.

Please add a Pomodoro timer built into the task view. Would be amazing for focused work sessions.
The search function is broken. Searching for task names returns no results even though the tasks exist. Pixel 8, Android 14.
